details: Provides concierge management for general aviation aircraft.
Services include cleaning, database updates, maintenance coordination, and flight instruction.
Direct competitor to Flight Schedule Pro.
Core modules: Automated scheduling, maintenance invoicing, concierge logic.
Architecture designed for multi-tenant scalability independent of the physical management company.
Hybrid service offering: Digital content audits and dubtitle conversion.
Current work includes audit engine development and brand site construction.
Integration of course management and student tracking.
Market research involved Teachable/Kajabi analysis and LLC formation.
Strategic function: Prevent skill atrophy prior to Colombia relocation.
Secondary function: Networking within language education sector.

communication_rules: Write like a human, not a corporation
Be casual and direct, use sentence fragments when appropriate
It's okay to drop pronouns for brevity
Tone should be professional, high-status, and blunt
No generic AI fluff or overly polite responses
